description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat, dark-colored roof and a prominent front porch supported by white columns. The facade features a symmetrical arrangement of windows and doors, with a balcony running along the upper floor. The property includes a paved driveway, two palm trees at the front, and a side area with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and an umbrella. Several deciduous trees are positioned around the lot, and there is a car parked in the driveway. The exterior walls are primarily white with dark accents, giving the building a contemporary, clean appearance. The overall layout is spacious, with clear separation between the living area, outdoor amenities, and landscaping.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, white columns, a front porch, balcony, and a side pool area, surrounded by trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two palm trees, driveway, and the pool area to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked car, and the symmetrical front porch with columns.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the balcony, pool area, sun loungers, umbrella, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, umbrella, and the rear landscaping with trees.
